case_title: TELESFORO CAROL VS EPELBAUM YULY et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $900.00 FILED BY TELESFORO CAROL AS TO DEFENDANT EPELBAUM YULY EPELBAUM NATALYA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-16-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EPELBAUM YULY EPELBAUM NATALYA
UNTIMELY SERVICE AS TO DEFENDS, NOT SERVED 20 DAYS PRIOR HRG. ON SUBSERVICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TELESFORO CAROL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EPELBAUM YULY EPELBAUM NATALYA $900.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $915.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-21-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03 TRIAL OF SEP-16-1993 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
